productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Grey Navy Flip Flop
description: Relax in comfort and style in these numero uno flip flops. Cushioned and durable, this pair is there to cushion every step of yours for years.Upper Mildly padded synthetic straps for abrasion resistance, comfort and to support the midfoot Velvetty feel to the strap upper Twill tape toe separator for comfort Midsole EVA footbed seen from the outsole for all-day cushioned comfort Outsole TPR outsole for durability Horizontal grooves and lugs all over the footbed for maximum traction Visible meshed midsole for cushioned comfort shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
